name: Bulgur Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the bulgur wheat in boiling water for 5 minutes.
2. Add yeast, flours, salt, and dry milk to a bread machine pan.
3. Add the bulgur mixture, honey, oil, and water to the bread machine.
4. Choose white bread setting and start the machine.
Makes 1 loaf, 8 slices. Each slice: 136 calories; 2 grams dietary fiber; less than 1 gram soluble fiber; 26 grams carbohydrates; 4 grams protein; 2 grams fat (13% calories from fat); 1 mg cholesterol; 284 mg sodium; 111 mg potassium; 21 mg calcium.
